incentive.statement: A shareable entrada URL must restore its entered source, Source/Authority/Result screen, Direct/Causative/Applicative derivative type, and valid Causative/Applicative Authority selections.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate URL serialization, panel restoration, and focused proof.

outcome: Refreshing an entrada URL preserves the named source on the same active screen, derivative type, and compactly encoded derived Authority state while legacy URLs retain Source and Direct defaults.

responsibilities.statement: Extend the canonical entrada URL snapshot with the active panel, derivative type, and one compact non-default VNC Authority capsule; restore them through existing controls and setters, including dynamic generated choices, and synchronously flush changes before an immediate refresh can race URL persistence.

actors.contribution: Serialize panel and derivative identity plus compact derived Authority selections, restore them through canonical controls, and reuse their canonical change events.

responsibilities.statement: Prove panel and derivative URL round-trip, legacy fallback, and refresh restoration wiring.

actors.contribution: Add focused hostile URL-state assertions for static and generated derived selections and run changed-path checks.

responsibilities.statement: Record the bounded target and closure evidence.

actors.contribution: Keep navigation persistence separate from grammar authority.

retirements.removalEvidence: Focused URL round-trip proof and live browser reloads retain the named entry on its screen and Causative derivative type; legacy URLs default to Source and Direct.

closure.detail: Refresh no longer unconditionally resets a valid entrada snapshot to Source and Direct; the canonical URL restoration path owns screen, derivative, and derived Authority state.

evidence.detail: Module UI filters passed 398/398 assertions, including compact derived-state round-trips, malformed capsule rejection, legacy Direct fallback, dynamic restoration wiring, and synchronous capture before rerender; syntax checks and git diff --check passed.

Fresh-origin Causative restored generated formation 4 plus embedded subject 2pl from v/40.54.84; Applicative restored generated formation 2 plus nonspecific-human imported object from v/40.52.b7. Both retained (chōca), screen/formula, and derivative identity with zero warning/error logs.
Architecture metrics stayed at baseline; the gate remains open for pre-existing board-size debt and unrelated dirty paths and PDF artifacts outside this action.
